title: Unity in Action: Sanlam Nigeria Hosts Inter-House Sports Day - FinancialEDGE
description: In a vibrant display of teamwork and camaraderie, Sanlam Nigeria recently brought together its employees for an unforgettable Inter-House Sports Day. The event was a celebration of unity, friendly competition, and the company's core values.
html: In a vibrant display of teamwork and camaraderie, Sanlam Nigeria recently brought together its employees for an unforgettable Inter-House Sports Day. The event was a celebration of unity, friendly competition, and the company’s core values.
